payload.answer: Validation failed: the prior model output did not meet schema and/or included an unsafe proposal. Do not write memory. Escalate to a stronger model for re-validation, or safely reject if escalation is unavailable.

entity_resolution.reason: Upstream output is invalid or unsafe, so no entity resolution can be performed reliably.

details: Detected invalid schema and/or unsafe proposal in upstream output.
Escalation or safe rejection is required.

repair_options: Escalate to a stronger model for full re-validation.
Safely reject the output and request a schema-compliant retry.
Discard any unsafe proposal and regenerate from source evidence only.
Do not commit any durable memory until validation passes.
